overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a grassy prairie at night in a video game environment. The player follows a dirt path illuminated by a torch, passing a large tree and encountering a cow in the open field under a starry sky.

narrow dirt trail winding through the tall grass
tall green grass covering the open prairie on both sides of the path
dark night sky with visible stars and faint clouds

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt path through tall grass at night. A large leaning tree dominates the left side of the frame while the starry sky is visible overhead.

events.description: character raises wooden torch into view, adding flickering warm light to illuminate the path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through open grassland holding a torch to light the way forward

entered.detail: hand-held wooden torch with flame providing warm flickering illumination
dark silhouette of distant trees on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The large tree falls behind as the path opens into wide grassland. The character holds a wooden torch that casts flickering light on the dirt path ahead, with distant trees visible on the horizon under the night sky.

events.description: a brown cow appears standing in the tall grass to the left of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path while passing a cow standing in the grass

notable_agents.action: brown cow standing still in the tall grass beside the path, watching the character pass by

entered.detail: brown cow with horns standing in the tall grass illuminated by torchlight

segments.scene_description: A brown cow stands in the grass to the left of the path, illuminated by the torchlight. The character walks past the stationary animal and continues into the open prairie as the path stretches ahead into the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a narrow dirt path that gradually opens into a vast, moonlit prairie. It begins by moving past a large leaning tree that dominates the left side of the frame under a clear, starry sky. As the tree recedes, the path expands into wide grasslands where a handheld wooden torch casts a flickering glow on the ground and reveals distant trees on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the torchlight illuminates a brown cow standing stationary in the grass to the left. Finally, the camera glides past the animal and continues forward, following the dirt path as it stretches deep into the surrounding darkness.
